testimonials.quote: We went from no online presence to consistent daily orders with a practical plan we could actually execute.
testimonials.result_summary: From 0 to first 100 online orders in 30 days.

testimonials.quote: GST and FSSAI paperwork stopped being a blocker, and we finally focused on selling.
testimonials.result_summary: Compliance documentation sorted and storefront operations stabilized.

testimonials.quote: We started as a side project and became a structured, operational brand with clear marketing systems.
testimonials.result_summary: Student-founder project transitioned into a registered and operational brand.
